description: Generic-intent → Brain Researcher stable-tier tool routing. Each intent declares a preferred call sequence, a fallback chain, and notes that constrain how the result should be described to the user.

intents.purpose: Discover what the BR MCP server exposes before invoking anything.
notes: Always call server_info first; verify contract_version matches your minimum.
Read stable_tools and deprecated_tools from the server_info payload before using a name.

intents.purpose: Check dataset facts, missing inputs, blockers, and candidate tools before committing to a plan.
notes: Feeds the candidate-tool list into validate-plan.

intents.purpose: Normalize schema, check path/policy constraints, catch validation issues.
notes: Validation is not execution — do not describe a passed validation as a finished analysis.

intents.purpose: Domain critique of tool ordering, parameter ranges, modality/space compatibility, plan completeness.
notes: Uses BR-KG by default (use_kg=True). Pass use_kg=False to skip KG-grounded checks in degraded environments.
QSM plans also get qsm_implementation_review hazards merged in.

intents.purpose: Produce a stateless, runnable recipe (local/container/cluster) for a resolved tool + params.
notes: The recipe is for the caller to execute; it does not execute anything itself.
target_runtime defaults to the tool's intrinsic preference; override only when the deployment context requires it.

intents.purpose: Resolve evidence reference anchors and downgrade weak/unresolved claims before reporting.
notes: Use grounding_resolve to verify individual anchors first.
Then run grounding_gate_evidence_basis on the full evidence_basis array before sending it into a report.
partial_action='downgrade' is the safe default; 'reject' fails closed for high-stakes claims.

intents.purpose: Read a normalized scorecard for a persisted run.
notes: Profile id defaults to the server's DEFAULT_LOOP_PROFILE_ID; pass explicitly when comparing across profiles.
Use run_compare for run-to-run deltas on the same profile.

intents.purpose: Draft a scientific report by reviewing a run/autoresearch workspace and rendering LaTeX.
notes: Provide exactly one of run_id or autoresearch_dir, not both.
use_judgment_critic=True is the default; switch off only for very small or scripted renders.
scientific_report_generate already calls grounding_gate_evidence_basis internally; do not double-gate.

domain_specific_intents.description: Long-tail intents like glm_first_level_fmri / motion_correction_fmri / connectivity_analysis are NOT in the v0.1.0 stable tier. Resolve them dynamically by calling tool_search with the intent name or its aliases. The canonical intent taxonomy lives in brain-researcher-public's configs/intent_priority.yaml.
